name: The Days and Nights of Molly Dodd
original_name: The Days and Nights of Molly Dodd
overview: Molly Dodd — a mid-30s, divorced woman living in New York — faces the comedy and drama of a widely changing career, difficulties of apartment living, love life and its consequences, and more.
